positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric arrangement featuring an anthropomorphic deep-sea manta ray, rendered in clean, contrasting lines and silhouettes. The ray should be gracefully positioned within a mandala-like floral lattice pattern that incorporates bioluminescent deep-sea elements, such as stylized jellyfish and glowing coral forms. The overall composition is centered and balanced, using limited, jewel-toned colors (deep sapphire, emerald green, glowing cyan, and metallic gold accents) against a clean white background, ensuring high contrast and print-readiness. The style is a blend of Art Deco elegance and modern psychedelic illustration, optimized for a central, wearable apparel print.
negative: ugly, low resolution, blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, malformed hands, cropped, poor composition, photographic, realism, gradient shading, sketch, messy, doodle
